texts.label: text
texts.orig: Please allow me to introduce Alama Camp Mara, a boutique camp overlooking the Maasai Mara National Reserve. Operational since May 2024, this charming camp offers your guests an exceptional view of the Reserve.
texts.text: Please allow me to introduce Alama Camp Mara, a boutique camp overlooking the Maasai Mara National Reserve. Operational since May 2024, this charming camp offers your guests an exceptional view of the Reserve.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Located along a tributary of the Mara River near Sopa Hills, Alama Camp Mara has 10 beautiful, well appointed rooms. In addition to a hot
texts.text: Located along a tributary of the Mara River near Sopa Hills, Alama Camp Mara has 10 beautiful, well appointed rooms. In addition to a hot

texts.label: text
texts.orig: shower, hair dryer and vanity kit, the camp's amenities include a jacuzzi in each room, a swimming pool, inhouse bar and in future a spa
texts.text: shower, hair dryer and vanity kit, the camp's amenities include a jacuzzi in each room, a swimming pool, inhouse bar and in future a spa

texts.label: text
texts.orig: During their stay with us, your guests will enjoy a complimentary sundowner on the camp grounds, soak in their jacuzzi with a drink of
texts.text: During their stay with us, your guests will enjoy a complimentary sundowner on the camp grounds, soak in their jacuzzi with a drink of

texts.label: text
texts.orig: choice and experience memorable safaris in the vast Maasai Mara National Reserve.
texts.text: choice and experience memorable safaris in the vast Maasai Mara National Reserve.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Kindly note that the nearest gate to Alama Camp is Oloolaimutia Gate which is 10 minutes from the camp while the closest airstrip is Keekorok
texts.text: Kindly note that the nearest gate to Alama Camp is Oloolaimutia Gate which is 10 minutes from the camp while the closest airstrip is Keekorok

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Airstrip which is about 20 minutes from the camp.
texts.text: Airstrip which is about 20 minutes from the camp.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: I am delighted to share with you the Alama Camp Mara 2025 STO rates.
texts.text: I am delighted to share with you the Alama Camp Mara 2025 STO rates.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: 1. Non resident contract rates; full board & ground package
texts.text: 1. Non resident contract rates; full board & ground package

texts.label: text
texts.orig: We have rooms available during the peak season and we would be delighted to host your guests.
texts.text: We have rooms available during the peak season and we would be delighted to host your guests.
